description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a low white perimeter wall and landscaped gardens. The structure features a flat, dark roof with multiple sections, and large windows that allow for ample natural light. The front yard includes a driveway leading to a covered carport, as well as manicured lawns and a blossoming tree. The rear and side yards are adorned with shrubs, small trees, and paved walkways, creating a private and inviting outdoor space. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roof and window frames. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a harmonious integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and landscaped gardens enclosed by a low white wall. Features include a driveway, carport, and a mix of lawns, trees, and paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entrance, and a prominent blossoming tree in the landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the perimeter wall, and additional greenery along the side garden.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area with shrubs, small trees, and paved walkways, as well as the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side garden, rear landscaping, and the continuation of the perimeter wall along the street.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
